aliases: Victory Front for the People of the Levant by the Mujahideen of the Levant on the Fields of Jihad
description: Sunni Islamist political and paramilitary group that fought in the Syrian civil war to overthrow Bashar al-Assad and establish an Islamic state. Formed in 2012, it was the official Syrian affiliate of Al-Qaeda from 2013 to 2016. In 2016 it broke ties with Al-Qaeda and renamed itself Jabhat Fatah Al-Sham, then merged into Hayat Tahrir Al-Sham in 2017.

country_links.evidence_quote: The British The Daily Telegraph stated in December 2012 that many foreign Al-Nusra fighters were hardened veterans from conflicts in Iraq and Afghanistan.
country_links.context: Al-Nusra Front drew hardened veteran fighters from the conflict in Afghanistan.

country_links.evidence_quote: militants from the group kidnapped 45 UN peacekeepers from Fiji from Golan Heights
country_links.context: Al-Nusra Front kidnapped 45 UN peacekeepers from Fiji in the Golan Heights.

country_links.evidence_quote: Iraq's deputy interior minister said in early February 2012 that weapons and Islamist militants were entering Syria from Iraq.
country_links.context: Al-Nusra Front sourced weapons and Islamist militants entering Syria from Iraq, and many of its members were Syrians who had fought in Iraq.

country_links.evidence_quote: There were cases of Al-Nusra combatants receiving medical aid in Israel and returning to fight.
country_links.context: Al-Nusra combatants received medical aid in Israel and returned to fight.

country_links.evidence_quote: Qatar's mediation between Al Nusra and Lebanon ultimately guaranteed Al-Nusra freedom of movement inside what was once a safe haven in Lebanon's Hamid valley, bordering Syria, giving Al Nusra access to the Lebanese town of Arsal.
country_links.context: Al-Nusra had freedom of movement inside Lebanon's Hamid valley and access to the Lebanese town of Arsal.

country_links.evidence_quote: two groups of UN peacekeepers from Philippines were trapped under fire in nearby Rwihinah
country_links.context: Al-Nusra Front trapped UN peacekeepers from the Philippines under fire and held them.

country_links.evidence_quote: Al-Nusra set a reward for the seizure of Russian soldiers
country_links.context: Al-Nusra Front set a reward for the seizure of Russian soldiers and warned of massacring them.

country_links.evidence_quote: Turkish newspapers reported that Turkish security forces had arrested Al-Nusra fighters in the southern provinces of Mersin and Adana near the Syrian border and confiscated 2 kg of sarin gas.
country_links.context: Al-Nusra fighters were arrested in Turkey for attempting to acquire chemicals to produce sarin gas.
